---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AIOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Cbetts1
---

## Feature Summary
A short, clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? What commands / APIs / behaviour?

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Diagrams, links, or examples that help explain the request.
